transcript: For those of you who are not familiar with RockawayX, um, we actually seeded Solana in 2018, and since then we became huge fans. Our VC fund actually invested in more than 16 Solana related projects. From the liquidity division, uh, we provided more than 300 million dollars to Solana applications in liquidity. Um, we also run bare metal validator with more than 1 billion dollars, uh, on it, uh, and we were early contributor to DoubleZero. So when we were thinking what's there next for Solana, what is the big... next big thing where we can support given our skillset, um, we believe that the next big thing for Solana and in general for crypto is risk curation business. If you look at the numbers, risk... risk curation business grew 20x in TVL over last two years. It peaked at 10 billion dollars and currently it is at around 6 billion dollars. But Solana has only 12% market share in it. So this is something we would like to change. So we are launching three, uh, vaults on Solana. First of all, uh, we will launch one risk curated vault on Kamino, uh, uh, focused on real world assets. Why real world assets? Simply because real world assets offer sustainable yield which is not correlated to crypto yields. And by crypto yield I mean, uh, you know, funding rates for example. But at the same time real world asset offers drawdowns, you know, which you kind of need to know how to work with it. Uh, for example you can diversify it, which is great because real world assets offer large set of collateral. Uh, but for some user because it's so large, it's very difficult to navigate. Uh, but I believe that if you do it right, uh, if you diversify the portfolio correctly, if you set up the right LTVs, then it's pretty good risk reward for the end user. Uh, but you don't only care about the legal risk... sorry, about the smart contract risk, you really need to review legal contracts, you need to make sure that you have legal recourse. So it's not that simple, so you need to kind of have even legal department actually to navigate right. We have seen lately that there is a capacity constraint for, uh, investment on chain at scale, and I think this is something, uh, real world assets, uh, solve as well. Especially if you have, uh, uh, set up the right, uh, liquidations. So I believe that there is a space for professional curator on the market, and, uh, we are partnering just with the biggest and largest and most, uh, and the best actually real world assets projects on Solana. Like Figure, On Re, Huma, and Solstice. So why do we think that we are the right partner to set up a curator business? Simply because we have been investing, uh, and providing liquidity and debt to centralized and decentralized entities for over... since 2022. And if you can recall, 2022 was pretty difficult year for lenders. We had so many defaults: Celsius, BlockFi, uh, Alameda. And we have... we have avoided all of those. So we have track record which shows zero defaults, uh, on our partners. We already rebuilt or helped to rebuild one private credit marketplace called Pareto.credit, uh, which has currently more than 100 million dollars in TVL. And last but not least, we can put our own balance sheet at work, so we can help with liquidations, which should give more comfort actually to LPs in our curated vault. But we are not stopping there. We are launching two more vaults, one with Exponent. So it will be Exponent dedicated vault, which will give user one-click, uh, exposure to, uh, optimized Exponent strategies. It will have clearly defined parameters to protect the end user, and we will also actively monitor the underlying assets. We are also bringing Midas to Solana. Midas will offer fund-like exposure to diversified portfolio of strategies to generate yield. It will offer daily liquidity and, uh, we will also publish monthly reports. In general, we believe that the market has to change for curators. We... we see that curators right now mostly focus on low frequency strategies like liquidity provisioning, the execution is still manual, uh, you know, the risk management is still not complete. Uh, it's still like semi-optimized to be honest, we have seen it recently. And I think that the curators 2.0 is more about algorithmic strategies, more about automated risk management, and also automated detection of investment opportunities. Thank you.

# Plume Brings Institutional Real-World Yield to Solana With Launch of RWA Nest Vaults

*Nest vaults with assets from WisdomTree, Hamilton Lane, BlackOpal and issuers including Securitize and SuperState mark the beginning of a new yield economy forSolana.*
NEW YORK,Dec. 5, 2025/PRNewswire/ --[Plume](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4573545-1&h=1349188964&u=https://plume.org/&a=Plume), the leading RWA blockchain powering real-world yield, today announced the launch of five RWA Nest vaults onSolana, setting real-world yield as a new base layer for the ecosystem and marking an important first step in Plume's multichain expansion for Nest.
Launching the vaults natively onSolanagives users direct investment opportunities to institutional-grade assets from WisdomTree, Hamilton Lane, BlackOpal, and issuers including Securitize and SuperState.Solanausers can natively access onchain credit, treasuries, and short-term receivables and the ability to earn institutional-grade real-world yield.
With the launch of nBASIS, nOPAL, nWISDOM, nALPHA and nTBILL Vaults,Solana's 20+ million users can soon deposit stablecoins natively into Nest to unlock reliable, stable, real-world APY. Each deposit returns a Nest vaulttoken, a liquid, yield-bearing asset that accrues value over time and can move seamlessly acrossSolanaDeFi, from DEX liquidity pools to lending and structured products, with the ability to redeem at any point.
As part of this integration, Plume is also launching a deep partnership with[Squads Lab](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4573545-1&h=2271106279&u=https://squads.xyz/&a=Squads+Lab),Solana's leading multi-sig and treasury management infrastructure provider. Plume will introduce its RWA yield pipelines across the Squads ecosystem, including a bespoke vault integrated for Altitude users and seamless RWA yield access for developers building with Grid.
*"Cryptois moving past the era of synthetic yield and into a market grounded in real economics. Stablecoins brought millions intocrypto, but yieldcoins will keep them here. This integration withSolanais the next step in building a transparent, programmable financial system at scale."*said Teddy Pornprinya, Co-Founder and CBO at Plume.
*"Plume already anchors over half of the industry's RWA activity, andSolanahas become one of the most efficient, high-throughput environments incrypto, making it a natural home for onchain credit, treasuries, and short-term receivables. Bringing our strengths together is how we unlock the next phase of onchain finan*ce".
By introducing institutional RWAs at scale, Plume is expanding theSolanaDeFiecosystem with sustainable, composable yield infrastructure that can underpin the next generation ofSolana-native financial applications.
Solanausers can instantly access boosted yield opportunities with Nest.
The Plume Nest Points Program is a rewards framework designed to turn participation into ownership. Users can earn Plume Nest Points by holding and using Nest vault tokens. The more users hold and deploy, the more they earn as part of the Season One program.
Solanausers will also soon unlock boosted yield opportunities with direct access to lending markets on Loopscale. These platform integrations allow leverage

# **Solmate (Nasdaq: SLMT) Announces Term Sheet to Acquire RockawayX, Creating Institutional Crypto Giant with Over $2 Billion in Combined AUM and Third-party Stake**
Share
*Strategic Combination would Combine Solmate’s Capital Markets Access with RockawayX’s Expertise in Infrastructure, Liquidity and Asset Management*
ABU DHABI, United Arab Emirates--([BUSINESS WIRE](https://www.businesswire.com))--Solmate Infrastructure (“Solmate”) (Brera Holdings PLC, NASDAQ: SLMT), the Solana infrastructure company with a strategic focus on Abu Dhabi, today announced the signing of a non-binding term sheet for a business combination with RockawayX. This would mark a transformation from a passive digital asset treasury to an integrated infrastructure, liquidity and asset management business.
**Transaction Highlights**
* Solmate would purchase all of the equity of RockawayX in an all-stock transaction, forming a crypto enterprise that integrates infrastructure, liquidity and asset management under one unified entity
* The combined entity would continue to trade under the ticker SLMT on the Nasdaq
* Marco Santori continues as Solmate CEO, overseeing the unified infrastructure and treasury strategy
* Viktor Fischer would continue as CEO of the RockawayX subsidiary an

tags.impact_reason: RockawayX, an institutional player heavily invested in Solana, is launching RWA vaults on Kamino, signaling further institutional interest and capital influx into the Solana ecosystem, further enhanced by news of acquisition by Solmate to create an institutional crypto giant.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a high-tech, curated vault as the Semantic Anchor because the story is centered on RockawayX launching 'Kamino RWA Vaults' to manage and 'curate' a diverse portfolio of Real World Assets. The vault symbolizes the security, value, and institutional nature of the product, while the carefully arranged contents represent the complex act of curation. I included the text '$6B' as a diegetic, holographic stencil on the vault drawer itself to highlight the massive market size RockawayX is targeting, which is a central data point in the narrative.
visual_idea.description: A dramatic, low-angle shot of a towering, futuristic vault wall made of brushed obsidian, receding into deep, atmospheric darkness. In the foreground, a single vault drawer is pulled open. Inside, a collection of glowing, multifaceted crystals of different colors and geometric shapes are perfectly arranged. A sleek, robotic arm is delicately placing another crystal into the set, signifying active curation. The text '$6B' is displayed as a soft, glowing holographic stencil on the side of the open drawer. Volumetric light shafts cut through the background, highlighting the immense scale of the treasury.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A dramatic, low-angle shot of a towering, futuristic vault wall, crafted from brushed obsidian, its textured surface subtly reflecting light as it recedes into deep, atmospheric darkness. The scale is immense, emphasizing height and grandeur, with ample negative space above. In the foreground, a single vault drawer, also of brushed obsidian, is pulled open, revealing its interior. Within the drawer, a meticulously arranged collection of luminous, multifaceted crystals glows with different vibrant colors and precise geometric shapes, each one a jewel of light. A sleek, metallic robotic arm, designed for delicate manipulation, extends into the drawer, carefully positioning another crystal into the pristine arrangement, signifying ongoing, active curation. On the side of the open drawer, the text '$6B' is displayed as a soft, glowing holographic stencil, casting a subtle luminescence. Powerful, cinematic volumetric light shafts pierce through the background, dramatically cutting through the darkness and highlighting the monumental scale and depth of this digital treasury. The lighting is high dynamic range, creating deep cinematic contrast with natural color grading, accentuating the luminous crystals and the brushed obsidian textures. Composed for a vertical 3:4 aspect ratio, with a sense of awe-inspiring height. 8k, octane render, raytracing, physically based rendering (PBR), global illumination, ultra-photorealistic, hyper-detailed, photorealism.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a high-tech, curated vault as the Semantic Anchor because the story is centered on RockawayX launching 'Kamino RWA Vaults' to manage and 'curate' a diverse portfolio of Real World Assets. The vault symbolizes the security, value, and institutional nature of the product, while the carefully arranged contents represent the complex act of curation. I included the text '$6B' as a diegetic, holographic stencil on the vault drawer itself to highlight the massive market size RockawayX is targeting, which is a central data point in the narrative.
visual_idea.description: A macro, top-down view into the open vault drawer. The shot focuses tightly on the collection of luminous, geometric crystals, each emitting a soft internal glow. The camera captures the intricate facets of the crystals nestled within a precision-cut, dark carbon fiber lining. The focus is on the interplay of light and texture—sharp specular highlights on the brushed metal edges of the drawer contrast with the soft light refracting through the crystalline assets.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A macro, top-down view looking directly into an open vault drawer, perfectly centered and composed for a square 1:1 aspect ratio. The frame is tightly filled with the rich interplay of textures. The primary focus is a collection of exquisitely luminous, geometric crystals, each emanating a soft internal glow, embodying the 'Luminous Crystal' aesthetic. These crystals exhibit intricate facets that refract and scatter light beautifully. They are precisely nestled within a precision-cut, dark carbon fiber lining, which possesses a 'Brushed Obsidian' texture, showcasing fine, subtle striations and a muted sheen. Sharp specular highlights intensely catch the light on the brushed metal edges of the drawer, providing a stark contrast to the ethereal, soft light gently refracting through the crystalline assets. 'Cinematic Volumetric Lighting' bathes the scene, creating dramatic light rays, deep shadows, and an overall sense of depth and preciousness, reminiscent of 'The Digital Treasury'. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, ultra-photorealistic, high dynamic range, cinematic contrast.

editorial.headline: RockawayX Targets $6B Curation Market with Kamino RWA Vaults
editorial.standfirst: The institutional validator giant launches a "Curation Layer" to bridge the gap between complex RWAs and passive capital. The move coincides with its acquisition by Solmate, creating a $2B infrastructure powerhouse.
key_takeaways: RockawayX debuts three risk-curated vaults on Kamino, Exponent, and Midas.
Underlying assets sourced from Figure, On Re, Huma, and Solstice.
Solmate (Nasdaq: SLMT) to acquire RockawayX, forming a $2B combined entity.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
While the industry obsesses over bringing Real World Assets (RWAs) on-chain, **RockawayX** argues the real bottleneck isn't supply—it's curation. In a keynote at Solana Breakpoint 2025, the firm unveiled its strategy to capture the "Risk Curation" market, a sector that grew 20x in two years to $6 billion TVL. Currently, Solana commands only a 12% share of this market. **RockawayX** intends to close that gap by acting as the professional underwriter between complex RWA issuers and passive liquidity, leveraging a track record that boasts zero defaults during the 2022 contagion events of Celsius and BlockFi.

The centerpiece of this offensive is a suite of three new vaults. The flagship is a risk-curated RWA vault on **Kamino**, designed to aggregate uncorrelated yields from top-tier issuers including **Figure** (home equity), **On Re** (reinsurance), **Huma** (receivables), and **Solstice** (yield vaults). By proactively managing Loan-to-Value (LTV) ratios and reviewing legal recourse off-chain, **RockawayX** aims to offer sustainable yield that doesn't evaporate when crypto funding rates dip. Additionally, the firm is launching a dedicated vault with **Exponent** for optimized fixed-yield strategies and bringing **Midas** to Solana to offer fund-like, diversified exposure with daily liquidity.

This product expansion arrives against the backdrop of massive corporate consolidation. **Solmate** (Nasdaq: SLMT) has entered a definitive agreement to acquire **RockawayX**, combining the latter's $1 billion validator business and venture portfolio with Solmate's capital markets access. This deal creates a $2 billion institutional giant capable of using its own balance sheet to backstop liquidations in these new vaults—providing a level of LP protection that purely crypto-native curators cannot match.
